data.name: Strip 'Em II: Facka's Game
data.detailed_description:
The sequel to the original Strip'Em is here:

Strip'Em 2: Facka's Game

the game that was declared illegal in Korea for being "too lewd"





Strip 'Em II is not just a poker game, it's a Fuck 'Em poker game, one where you get sexy ladies to play with you and, should you win, strip for you and even more.



Full game features:
- Over 1000 sexy or full of sexual content images!!!
- 5 female characters
- Story Mode: Preset matches that follow a story. Will you be a champion and fuck them all or will you be humiliated by the best female amateur poker players?
- Freestyle Mode: This allows you to play against any of the ladies, and play against one or 5 at the same time.



- A nice, relaxing audio atmosphere.
- A very nice relaxed Texas Hold'Em poker mechanic. Including different Poker Limit Rules, Tournaments or Cash Games, and optional use of a short card deck.
- Difficulty modes: You can either win very easily or play hard!




Announcing

Strip'Em III




Please consider adding it to your wishlist, it really helps!

data.short_description: Strip 'Em II: Facka's Game, is not just a poker game, it's a Fuck 'Em poker game, one where you get sexy ladies to play with you and, should you win, strip for you and even more.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 捷克文, 荷蘭文, 日文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1
  • 處理器: Dual Core Processor (i3 or equivalent)
  • 顯示卡: 1GB of Video Ram
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1 or above
  • 處理器: Quad Core Processor (i5 or equivalent)
  • 顯示卡: 2GB of Video Ram or above
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 8.1
  • Processor: Dual Core Processor (i3 or equivalent)
  • Graphics: 1GB of Video Ram
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 8.1 or above
  • Processor: Quad Core Processor (i5 or equivalent)
  • Graphics: 2GB of Video Ram or above
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
